title: Multi-Consumer Isolation and Platform Operations
description: Run all hosted consumer suites concurrently and validate operational isolation, recovery, and portability boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: Concurrent consumer execution preserves authority and data isolation boundaries
Purpose limitation and tenant boundaries hold under contention and queue pressure
Operational telemetry provides attributable diagnostics without privacy boundary leakage
Incident response and recovery paths are exercised and receipted
Portability and deterministic reconstruction remain valid after multi-consumer stress
